zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery於大約1227年出生在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利時，她的父親Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley34歲，母親Nichole d'Aubigny18歲。她和Sir Walter de Sudeley至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1312年在英國英格蘭享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery于大约1227年出生在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利时，她的父亲Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley34岁，母亲Nichole d'Aubigny18岁。她和Sir Walter de Sudeley至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1312年在英国英格兰享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: 'Mabel'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery was born about 1227, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, was 34 and her mother, Nichole d'Aubigny, was 18. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Walter de Sudeley. She died about 1312, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery est née environ 1227, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Nichole d'Aubigny, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Walter de Sudeley. Elle est décédée environ 1312, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery um 1227 in Dudley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley 34 und ihre Mutter Nichole d'Aubigny 18. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter de Sudeley mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1312 im Alter von 87 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery è nata il circa 1227 nel Dudley, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Nichole d'Aubigny, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Walter de Sudeley. Morì circa 1312, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Someryが約1227年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudleyは34歳，母Nichole d'Aubignyは18歳であった。彼女はSir Walter de Sudeleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1312年にイギリスイギリスで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery(이)가 대략 1227년 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole d'Aubigny(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter de Sudeley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Nichole d'Aubigny, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir Walter de Sudeley. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1312, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery родилась около 1227 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Nichole d'Aubigny, 18. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Walter de Sudeley. Она умерла около 1312 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth 'Mabel' de Somery nació aproximadamente 1227, en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Nichole d'Aubigny, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sir Walter de Sudeley. Murió aproximadamente 1312, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
